nasb.text: There will be tribulation and distress for every soul of man who does evil, of the Jew first and also of the Greek,

esv.text: There will be tribulation and distress for every human being who does evil, the Jew first and also the Greek,

cnv.text: 把患難和愁苦加給所有作惡的人，先是猶太人，後是希臘人，

ccb.text: 一切作恶之人必受患难和痛苦，先是犹太人，然后是希腊人。

csbs.text: 神要把患难和困苦加给一切作恶之人的灵魂，先是犹太人的，后是外邦人的；
